description: Aiera is a financial intelligence platform that provides access to earnings calls, transcripts, corporate events, SEC filings, company publications, and related AI-enabled research workflows. Its products are aimed at integrating financial data into applications and AI tools.
summary: Aiera exposes a documented REST API at `https://premium.aiera.com/api/` authenticated by `X-API-Key`, plus a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp-pub.aiera.com/` over streamable HTTP that supports OAuth connector login and API-key query auth.
